risks.risk: Local env files can contain database URLs, auth secrets, OpenRouter keys, OAuth secrets, and Resend credentials.
risks.required_behavior: Do not read, print, summarize, or edit secret-bearing env files unless Christian explicitly asks. Use .env.example for variable names.

risks.risk: Schema and migration changes can alter live data shape and deploy behavior.
risks.required_behavior: Generate migrations only for intentional schema changes. Review SQL. Ask before applying migrations to any live DATABASE_URL.

risks.risk: The demo seed truncates app tables, and starter persona seeding writes to the configured database.
risks.required_behavior: Confirm DATABASE_URL targets a development database before running seeds. Never use ALLOW_PROD_SEED=1 without explicit approval.

risks.risk: Deploy config, preflight checks, and cron routes affect production routing, database safety, and scheduled cleanup.
risks.required_behavior: Ask before deploys, production config changes, or commands that inspect production database state.

risks.risk: Auth changes can expose operator access; AI endpoint changes can spend money or weaken fail-closed behavior.
risks.required_behavior: Preserve allowlists, fail-closed behavior, rate limits, and tests. Do not add password identity to AI_ALLOWED_IDENTITIES.

risks.risk: Importing server runtime code into client bundles can leak assumptions, break browser builds, or expose env-dependent code.
risks.required_behavior: Do not import runtime server code from src/server/** into client pages/components/libs. Shared client-safe types and utilities belong in src/lib/.

risks.risk: Adding new function files can increase deploy surface and violate the intentionally capped function budget.
risks.required_behavior: Prefer extending existing dispatchers such as api/operator/[kind].ts or catch-all routes before adding entrypoints. Update tests deliberately if the budget changes.

risks.risk: Generated outputs can be stale or noisy; package-lock changes can alter dependency resolution.
risks.required_behavior: Do not hand-edit generated build outputs. Review lockfile and Drizzle metadata changes carefully when commands produce them.

risks.risk: Launcher scripts manage local processes, generated app bundles, baked repo paths, and local machine state.
risks.required_behavior: Ask before installing the desktop app. Rebuild after path or launcher changes. Do not assume generated desktop/ output should be committed.
